allow: Bash(powershell -Command "$pids = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique; if \($pids\) { Stop-Process -Id $pids -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep 3; \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).Count")

Bash(powershell -Command "$pids = \(Get-NetTCPConnection -LocalPort 5000 -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).OwningProcess | Sort-Object -Unique; if \($pids\) { Stop-Process -Id $pids -Force -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue }; Start-Sleep 2")
